subject: Physics
title: Vacuum Decay: Instant Annihilation
description: A micro-lesson that makes Vacuum Decay: Instant Annihilation usable.

hook.text: Our vacuum might not be the true lowest energy state. If it drops, a bubble of destruction expands at light speed.

buildup.text: Quantum fields have energy levels. If our vacuum is a 'false vacuum,' it's like sitting in a valley that isn't the deepest.

discovery.text: A quantum fluctuation could trigger a transition to the true vacuum. A bubble of new physics would form.

twist.text: Inside the bubble, the laws of physics are different. Atoms, chemistry, and life as we know it couldn't exist.

climax.text: The bubble expands at light speed. You'd never see it coming—it arrives before any warning signal could.

punchline.text: A bubble of doom expanding at light speed. No warning. No escape.

quiz.question: Why couldn't we see vacuum decay coming?
options: The bubble expands at the speed of light, so no warning can arrive ahead of it
It only happens in other dimensions
It produces no light or radiation
